zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Griffin於1670年4月2日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾時，她的父親John Griffin25歲，母親Lydia Shatswell26歲。她於1690年與Daniel Morrison Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1700年10月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年30歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波雷波特索耶 希爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Griffin于1670年4月2日出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾时，她的父亲John Griffin25岁，母亲Lydia Shatswell26岁。她于1690年与Daniel Morrison Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可勞利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1700年10月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年30岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波雷波特索耶 希爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Griffin was born on 2 April 1670, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, her father, John Griffin, was 25 and her mother, Lydia Shatswell, was 26. She married Daniel Morrison Jr in 1690, in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 October 1700, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 30, and was buried in Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Griffin est née le 2 avril 1670, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, John Griffin, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lydia Shatswell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel Morrison Jr en 1690, à Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 octobre 1700, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Griffin am 2. April 1670 in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Griffin 25 und ihre Mutter Lydia Shatswell 26. Sie hat 1690 in Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Daniel Morrison Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Oktober 1700 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Griffin è nata il il 2 aprile 1670 nel Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Griffin, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lydia Shatswell, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Daniel Morrison Jr nel 1690, nel Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1700, nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Bradford, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusett: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルブラドフォード ブリアル グロウンド

ja.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Griffinが1670年4月2日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルで生まれた時，父John Griffinは25歳，母Lydia Shatswellは26歳であった。1690年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスロウリーでDaniel Morrison Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1700年10月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで30歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリプオルトサウヤー ヒル ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리
ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이
ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이

ko.Bradford, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusett: 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐 브래드퍼드 버이앨 그라운드
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Griffin(이)가 1670년 4월 2일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Griffin(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lydia Shatswell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1690년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 로우리에서 Daniel Morrison Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1700년 10월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이포트 사w예르 힐 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Griffin nasceu em 2 de abril de 1670, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Griffin, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Shatswell, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniel Morrison Jr em 1690, em Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1700, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Griffin родилась 2 апреля 1670 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Griffin было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lydia Shatswell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Morrison Jr в 1690 г. в местности роули, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 октября 1700 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности савиир хилл буринг гроунд, нюбурипорт, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Griffin nació el 2 de abril de 1670, en Haverhill, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Griffin, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lydia Shatswell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Daniel Morrison Jr en 1690, en Rowley, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1700, en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Sawyer Hill Burying Ground, Newburyport, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
